title: Peter Rabbit Wheelbarrow Toy - Kids Wooden Toddler Garden Toys, Pretend Play - Childrens Toy Tools, Indoor Outdoor Gardening Set, Girls Boys - Official Licensed Peter Rabbit Gifts by Orange Tree Toys
availability_text: Only 8 left in stock (more on the way).
features: OFFICIAL LICENSED PETER RABBIT TOYS: Help little ones learn to love the outdoors with this beautiful wooden Peter Rabbit wheelbarrow set. The set contains a sturdy wooden wheelbarrow, a fork and trowel, a watering can, planting pots, a flower, a carrot and turnip and a lovely little robin!

SAFE FOR PLAY: Brightly painted with non toxic paint and comes with a removable lid, perfect for storing away all the pieces! All Orange Tree toys are tested both in-house during production and independently to meet European safety standards. Suitable from age 36 months, wooden toys are durable and long lasting; they can be passed down the generations!

PROMOTES DEVELOPMENT: Make learning fun; this toy wheelbarrow set has been made for little hands to grasp and is great for encouraging imaginative and social play, whilst encouraging children to learn about planting and growing veggies

TRUSTED MANAFACTURER: Designed in the UK by Orange Tree Toys, in their headquarters in the Cotswold countryside. Orange Tree toys are environmentally friendly; this product is made from FSC certified wood and 100% recyclable packaging. By choosing this product, you are supporting responsible management of the world's forests

PERFECT GIFT: Beatrix Potter’s famous creation crafted into a wonderful wooden wheelbarrow set, perfect toddler toys. Peter Rabbit Wooden Toys are ideal Christening gifts for girls and boys, ideal special gifts for 1st Birthday, Christmas or other special occasion
description: From the manufacturer Peter Rabbit Wooden Wheelbarrow Set Beatrix Potter’s famous creation crafted into a wonderful wooden wheelbarrow set, perfect toddler toys. Peter Rabbit Wooden Toys are ideal Christening gifts for girls and boys, ideal special gifts for 1st Birthday, Christmas or other special occasion. Help little ones learn to love the outdoors with this beautiful wooden Peter Rabbit wheelbarrow set. The set contains a sturdy wooden wheelbarrow, a fork and trowel, a watering can, planting pots, a flower, a carrot and turnip and a lovely little robin! Traditional Wooden Toys Our beautiful wooden toys are all lovingly designed in the UK. Our toys are designed for maximum fun and safety, proving a range a beautifully crafted traditional children's toys which last for years are are sure to become toy box treasures. Offically Licensed We are proud to hold the license for some truly tradition childhood favourite! We offer a beautiful range of products for Beatrix Potter's Peter Rabbit. Designed for Maximum Fun & safety All Orange Tree toys are tested both in-house during production and independently to meet European safety standards. All of our toys are painted using non-toxic paint.
